message:
feat(ensemble): add token budget estimation command

New 'ntm ensemble estimate' command that predicts token usage before
running an ensemble session.

Features:
- Estimates tokens per mode based on historical data or defaults
- Calculates total budget including synthesis/context reserves
- Warns when nearing budget limits (>85% threshold)
- Suggests alternative modes to reduce token usage
- Supports JSON/YAML/table output formats
- Integrates with existing preset system

This helps users understand and optimize their token budget before
committing to an expensive ensemble run.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -117,6 +117,7 @@ Primary usage:
 	cmd.AddCommand(newEnsembleStatusCmd())
 	cmd.AddCommand(newEnsembleStopCmd())
 	cmd.AddCommand(newEnsembleSuggestCmd())
+	cmd.AddCommand(newEnsembleEstimateCmd())
 	cmd.AddCommand(newEnsembleSynthesizeCmd())
 	cmd.AddCommand(newEnsembleExportFindingsCmd())
 	cmd.AddCommand(newEnsembleProvenanceCmd())
